name: joplin-plugin-rich-toc-top
description: Generate or refresh a TOC at the top of the current Joplin note / 在当前 Joplin 笔记顶部生成或刷新目录，并提供支持滚动与层级过滤的侧边目录。
author: zhohoku814

scripts.dist: webpack --env joplin-plugin-config=buildMain && webpack --env joplin-plugin-config=buildExtraScripts && webpack --env joplin-plugin-config=createArchive
